statement.en: Video Game Localisation and Culturalisation- From Traditional Translation Theory to AI-assisted Applications

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint (dated 2026-04-25, future-dated or recent submission) in an emerging interdisciplinary field combining translation theory, cultural studies, and AI. The axiom about AI-assisted video game localization/culturalization is not yet empirically validated at scale, subject to ongoing debate about AI translation quality, cultural appropriateness, and methodological frameworks. Classification as FLOWING reflects provisional status pending peer review and practical validation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: ゲームの翻訳は言葉を超え、文化的文脈の曲線を積分することで初めて生命が宿る。

visualGlyph.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='50' cy='50' r='35' stroke='#7c3aed' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/><path d='M 50 15 Q 35 50 50 85 Q 65 50 50 15' stroke='#00d4ff' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/><text x='50' y='55' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle' fill='#00ff88'>AI</text><circle cx='30' cy='40' r='4' fill='#ec4899'/><circle cx='70' cy='40' r='4' fill='#f59e0b'/><line x1='30' y1='40' x2='70' y2='40' stroke='#ffd700' stroke-width='1.5' opacity='0.6'/></svg>
visualGlyph.interpretation: AIは左右の言語と文化を橋渡しし、その中心で螺旋状に意味を編み直す。
